description: Ruby script where the vulnerable Response#body call exists only in a test file (test/test_response.rb) with no entry point from app.rb. CVE-2022-23633 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: response.body is called in test/test_response.rb but that file is not required from app.rb. Production code never reaches the vulnerable function.

findings.human_justification: The vulnerable body call exists only in test_response.rb which is not reachable from app.rb. Production code never invokes the vulnerable response body method.
